---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to be added.

## Use Case

Why do you need this feature? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? (pseudocode, examples, mockups, etc.)

## Alternatives Considered

Are there other ways to solve this? Any workarounds?

## Additional Context

Any other context, similar tools, references, etc.
